_comment: DM MLS test vectors — validated by test_mls_vectors.py

dm_initiate_accept_round_trip.description: Full DM lifecycle: export key package, initiate session, accept welcome, encrypt/decrypt both directions

dm_welcome_seal_unseal.description: Welcome payload sealed to alias-scoped X25519 key can be unsealed by recipient only

dm_lock_rejects_legacy_dm1.description: After MLS session is established, DM1 format is permanently hard-failed

dm_session_isolation.description: DM sessions between different alias pairs are isolated; cross-pair decrypt fails

dm_private_tier_blocks_dm1_fallback.description: In private_transitional or private_strong tier, DM1 legacy path is hard-failed even without prior MLS

dm_key_package_export.description: Export key package produces valid bundle with welcome_dh_pub
